description.short: AI-powered incident detection, diagnosis, and remediation
description.full: AutoOps AI monitors your infrastructure, detects anomalies, diagnoses root causes using AI, and orchestrates remediation with human-in-the-loop approval. Get real-time incident alerts, approve or deny remediations, and query system status — all from Microsoft Teams.

commands.title: status
commands.description: Show current agent and infrastructure status

commands.title: incident
commands.description: Get details for a specific incident (e.g. incident INC-42)

commands.title: approve
commands.description: Approve a pending remediation (e.g. approve INC-42)

commands.title: deny
commands.description: Deny a pending remediation (e.g. deny INC-42)
